emails.subject: Re: Andy Becnel and Bruce Reemsnyder
emails.body: Re: Andy Becnel and Bruce Reemsnyder Any way you think Andrew might like power trading? His resume looks strong.

emails.subject: Re: Andy Becnel and Bruce Reemsnyder
emails.body: maybe. He was in today and met with Mark Taylor, Travis, and Lance, to positive results. I certainly could ask him if he's interested in trading. Leslie Hansen thinks highly of him. Michelle From: Elizabeth Sager on 12/06/2000 02:57 PM
